chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Direct Offspring

text: 5605 - وَ رَوَى جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ : "وَرِثَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ مِنْ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ عِلْمَهُ وَ وَرِثَتْ فَاطِمَةُ عَلَيْهَا اَلسَّلاَمُ تَرِكَتَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5605 - Jamil bin Darraj narrated from Zurara, who reported from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), that he said:
"Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) inherited the knowledge of the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family), and Sayyida Fatimah {s.a} (peace be upon her) inherited his possessions."
